description_long: This is a modern, single-story house set on a rectangular plot with a well-manicured lawn and several large, leafy trees providing shade and privacy. The house features a flat roof, large windows, and a mix of materials including light-colored walls and glass, giving it a contemporary appearance. There is a visible swimming pool in the backyard, along with a patio area and outdoor seating, suggesting a focus on outdoor living. The front of the house is accessible via a paved walkway leading from the street, flanked by trees and greenery. The layout is open, with multiple sections of the house connected by glass corridors or open spaces. The property is bordered by a sidewalk and driveway, integrating it seamlessly into an urban or suburban neighborhood.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and a backyard pool, surrounded by trees and a manicured lawn.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, walkway, and several trees partially obscuring the house facade.
description_view_1: Top-down angle highlighting the flat roof, backyard pool, patio, and the arrangement of trees around the property.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, pool, patio area, and large windows opening to the outdoor space.
description_view_3: Side/rear angle emphasizing the pool, patio, and the connection between different house sections, with trees lining the property edge.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a simple door, paved walkway, and minimal overhang, flanked by trees and landscaping.
